author: Dohyeon.00
name: Hyperbolic Q/K Lite (1xH100, 10min)
blurb: Non-record 1xH100 submission exploring a lightweight hyperbolic attention modification: only q/k are mixed through a Lorentz-style transform with trainable hyperbolic_qk_mix and hyperbolic_radius, while the rest of the GPT-style stack remains mostly Euclidean. Main 600s run reached final_int8_zlib_roundtrip val_bpb 1.32877977 at 11.67MB.
